nasb.text: And the devil said to Him, “I will give You all this domain and its glory; for it has been handed over to me, and I give it to whomever I wish.

esv.text: and said to him, “To you I will give all this authority and their glory, for it has been delivered to me, and I give it to whom I will.

cnv.text: 對他說：“這一切權柄、榮華，我都可以給你；因為這些都交給了我，我願意給誰就給誰。

ccb.text: 又说：“我要把这一切权势和荣耀都给你，因为这一切全交给我了，我想给谁就给谁。

csbs.text: 对他说：“这一切权柄和荣耀我都将给你，因为这已经交给了我，我愿意给谁就给谁。
